title: Market Brief — Monday, June 15, 2026
summary: GPU supply is loose and loosening fast. Util-avail sits at 47% for A100, 48% for H100, 58% for H200, and 58% for B200, all comfortably above oversupply thresholds after 30-day utilization collapsed 36-52 percentage points across every class. H200 spot dropped 7.1% overnight to $3.35/hr, the day's sharpest move, while B200 bucked the trend rising 6.0% to $4.38/hr on early-cycle demand.
paragraphs: GPU supply is loose and loosening fast. Util-avail sits at 47% for A100, 48% for H100, 58% for H200, and 58% for B200, all comfortably above oversupply thresholds after 30-day utilization collapsed 36-52 percentage points across every class. H200 spot dropped 7.1% overnight to $3.35/hr, the day's sharpest move, while B200 bucked the trend rising 6.0% to $4.38/hr on early-cycle demand.

Inference margins are brutal outside premium tiers. At TCO-adjusted cost (1.25x spot), serving Llama 70B on H100 runs $8.78/M tokens, meaning DeepSeek V3.2 at $0.34/M output is selling at a loss of roughly $8.44 per million tokens. DeepSeek: Burning Cash. OpenAI gpt-oss-120b at $0.18/M output: Burning Cash. Qwen sub-$0.60 models: Burning Cash. Only premium-priced Anthropic Opus 4.6 at $25/M output and OpenAI o3 Pro at $80/M earn real margin: both Strong.

B200 at $4.38/hr spot looks overvalued given 58% util-avail slack and 76% of NeoCloud offerings sitting idle, while H200 at $3.35/hr post-correction with 209.6% annualized vol is the dislocation trade for cost-optimized inference workloads.
bullets: 58% util-avail on B200 signals meaningful oversupply despite being the newest GPU class.
48% util-avail on H100 reflects a 45.7 percentage point utilization crash in 30 days.
$3.35/hr H200 spot median is down 7.1% day-over-day, the steepest single-day GPU drop.
21.78 LLMflation index means frontier token prices have fallen 78% since GPT-4 launch.
$0.18/M output on OpenAI gpt-oss-120b is the lowest price ever from a major lab.
209.6% annualized volatility on H200 OCPI makes it the most unstable GPU contract by 3x.
